# Skill Registry — Stack Estadistico Licencias

<!-- Auto-generated by sdd-init. Last refresh: 2026-06-22 -->

**Type**: Project-scoped registry (SDD-aware)
**Status**: Initialized for stack-estadistico-licencias
**Strict TDD**: Disabled (no test runner detected)

## Contract

This registry is an **index**, not a summary. When delegating work, pass only the exact `SKILL.md` paths matching the task context. Sub-agents read full skill source files before work to preserve author intent.

## Loading Protocol

1. Match task context and target files against the `Trigger / description` column.
2. Pass **only** matching `Path` values to the sub-agent under `## Skills to load before work`.
3. Instruct the sub-agent to read those exact `SKILL.md` files **before** task-specific work.
4. If no matching skill exists, proceed without injection and report `skill_resolution: none`.
